# Plan 10.0.5-05 — Docs, Sample Data & Known-Failures — SUMMARY

## What shipped (closes SC3)

**Task 1 — real sample artifacts** (generated by actually running the shipped workflows
once against this repo via a throwaway scratchpad script, NOT committed):
- `sample-data/repo-triage-sample.md` — real top-level listing of THIS repo (42 entries) + README excerpt.
- `sample-data/research-brief-sample.md` — real FTS5 brief over 4 seeded "atlas" codex matches.
- `sample-data/self-review-sample.md` — the **proposed** (pending, never-written) review note, headed with an explicit "PROPOSED — pending approval" banner.
- Secret-scanned clean before commit (T-1005-13).

**Task 2 — operator docs** (mirroring `docs/tools.md` style):
- `docs/golden-workflows.md` — runbook: safety model, the 3-workflow table, per-workflow
  sections linking each sample file, the real `atlas golden list|run|reset` command surface
  (+ `atlas tools approve|reject` cross-ref for Self-Review), the `pytest …smoke` quality
  gate, the dry-run-default demo-reset, and the audit-event naming note.
- `docs/known-failures.md` — honest limitations: (1) live screenshots deferred to operator
  UAT, (2) determinism is a mock-mode guarantee not a live-LLM one (by design), (3) no
  `web_fetch` Research Brief variant yet — plus graceful edge cases and the known
  pre-existing `claude_agent_sdk` env failure.

## Verification

- `ls sample-data/ | grep -c sample` → 3, each non-empty and traceable to real workflow output.
- `docs/golden-workflows.md` contains `## Repo Triage` and `atlas golden`;
  `docs/known-failures.md` contains `## Known Limitations` and all 3 deferred items
  (screenshots / non-mock LLM non-determinism / web_fetch) — grep-confirmed.

## Deviations

None of substance. Executed inline by the orchestrator (wave-4/5 subagent hit a provider
session limit); same atomic-commit discipline. The sample generator lives in the scratchpad
and is not committed, per the plan.

## must_haves status

- ✅ An operator can run all 3 workflows + smoke + demo-reset from docs/golden-workflows.md alone.
- ✅ Real sample artifact output exists on disk for each of the 3 workflows.
- ✅ Known limitations documented honestly (all 3 deferred items + edge cases).
